title: Bucket’Em Remodeled
description: Adds detailed 3D models for all mobs from the Bucket'Em mod! Perfect for players who want more immersion and style when capturing creatures.
body:
<center>
  
![REMODELED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08255cb7fee6cf515a6d92447041fbd628604b07.png)

<hr>

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png)

This resource pack adds 3D models for all creatures collected with the mod [Bucket'Em](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucketem). Inventory icons remain 2D by default.
Many thanks to [weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson) for the bottle and bucket models from [3D Tools and Utils](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils)

![models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65e0c693e8d402b5f117aac8982f50b15764e33.png)


![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)

<details>
<summary>Recommended Mods</summary>

[![HoldMyItems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8108654883aaca19ccdadf2a83eba944e75e9c7_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Required Mods on 1.21.1 and 1.20.1</summary>

[![Pommel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec9d42dbd5f72ce52222b45e8b9e67c89607fdcd_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models)[![Connector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6397a2c209c869833a6b4570adead1448ca877db_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
</details>

<hr>

![SOCIAL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a589317ddf3c8c3b1ea88d9117470c0086c06cf.png)

[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62848b0b2dc2168bb69facbdd1cc388467c9f30e.png)](https://discord.gg/uKsZnjw8RQ)
